title: Usopp’s Village Comes Into View
description: On pages 4–7, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: All of you, get the hell out of here now!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Dont say that, the chef is gonna get mad!

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: He tried hard to come up with some food suited for your health, ojousama

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Why did you have to say it like that?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I know I kept it from you,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp Pirate
dialogue.text: Secretly talking to usopp-san, is my fault...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But you shouldn't have chased him away like that...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I can never forget what happened that day...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Three years ago, I was working on a ship,

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Because of a small mistake, I was fired...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Afterwards, I got lost wandering and ended up in this village

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I didn't have any money, and didn't know what to do, but your dad took me in...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: If he hadn't done that, I would be dead now

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: To me, your late parents were my Saviors

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
